content: Meet the new face of Gotham. #ClayfaceMovie only in theaters October 23. DC Studios’ “Clayface” is a horror thriller from director James Watkins, starring Tom Rhys Harries in the title role of the cult favorite villain from Gotham’s rogues gallery. Matt Hagen’s meteoric rise from Gotham street kid to Hollywood leading man is tragically cut short when a local crime boss’s actions leave him horribly disfigured. Abandoned by his team and with nothing left, Matt seeks out a cutting edge treatment that miraculously returns him to his former self… but also unexpectedly affects his grip on reality, spiraling him down a destructive path of all-consuming revenge. The film also stars Naomi Ackie, David Dencik, Max Minghella and Eddie Marsan, as well as Nancy Carroll and Joshua James. James Watkins directs from a screenplay by Mike Flanagan and Hossein Amini, story by Flanagan, based on characters from DC. The film is produced by Matt Reeves, Lynn Harris, James Gunn and Peter Safran, with Michael E. Uslan, Chantal Nong Vo, Lars P. Winther, Rafi Crohn and Paul Ritchie executive producing. Watkins’ creative team includes director of photography Rob Hardy, production designer James Price, editor Jon Harris and costume designer Keith Madden. Music is by Volker Bertelmann. DC Studios Presents a 6th & Idaho Production, a James Watkins Film, “Clayface.” The film will be distributed by Warner Bros. Pictures and released only in theaters in North America on October 23, 2026, and internationally beginning 21 October 2026.
chineseTitle: | 泥 | 面 | | | 官 | 方 | 预 | 告 | 片 |
chineseContent: 认识哥谭的新面孔。 #ClayfaceMovie 仅于 10 月 23 日在影院上映。 DC Studios 的《Clayface》是詹姆斯·沃特金斯 (James Watkins) 导演的恐怖惊悚片，由汤姆·里斯·哈里斯 (Tom Rhys Harries) 主演，饰演哥谭流氓画廊中最受邪教喜爱的恶棍。马特·哈根从哥谭街头小子一跃成为好莱坞男主角，但由于当地犯罪头目的行为使他严重毁容，他的成长之路不幸戛然而止。马特被团队抛弃，一无所有，他寻求一种最先进的治疗方法，奇迹般地让他恢复到以前的自我……但也出乎意料地影响了他对现实的掌控，使他走上了一条毁灭性的、全力以赴的复仇之路。这部电影的主演还有娜奥米·阿基、大卫·丹西克、马克斯·明格拉和埃迪·马森，以及南希·卡罗尔和约书亚·詹姆斯。詹姆斯·沃特金斯执导，根据迈克·弗拉纳根和侯赛因·阿米尼的剧本，弗拉纳根的故事，根据 DC 人物改编。该片由马特·里夫斯、林恩·哈里斯、詹姆斯·古恩和彼得·萨夫兰担任制片人，迈克尔·E·乌斯兰、尚塔尔·农沃、拉尔斯·P·温瑟、拉菲·克罗恩和保罗·里奇担任监制。沃特金斯的创意团队包括摄影指导罗布·哈迪、制作设计师詹姆斯·普莱斯、剪辑师乔恩·哈里斯和服装设计师基思·马登。音乐由沃尔克·贝特曼创作。 DC Studios 推出第六部爱达荷州制作的詹姆斯·沃特金斯电影《Clayface》。该影片将由华纳兄弟影业发行，仅于 2026 年 10 月 23 日在北美影院上映，并于 2026 年 10 月 21 日开始在全球上映。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 YouTube 热门视频信号，适合用于观察大众注意力、内容叙事、传播主题和跨平台选题机会。
